title: Blossom Pixel
description: A fabric mod that focus on server-play-oriented features
body:
# Blossom Pixel

## supported language

- zh-tw
- en-us

## target user

for those who need easy teleport system & friend teleport feature

## features

1. teleport system
> - create a server/client side mark that can be teleported
> - can teleport to friends via a button
> - the time of teleport count down depends on how far the mark it is
2. easy expend features
> - cooked puffer fish
> - smoked rotten flesh

## future works plan

> - right-click farming
> - auto mine-block feature based on dispensor
> - fish system enhance
